utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with specific costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with cost and benefit details; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with cost and benefits; additional_services lists enhancement services with individual costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan lists 'PrimeCare / LifeFirst' as the provider across health, property, and travel categories. In the ground-truth ratings, 'PrimeCare' and 'LifeFirst' correspond to separate plans. For physical health (€200/month), the only PrimeCare option at that cost is the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' (rating 10). For mental health (€65/month), the matching LifeFirst plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 8). For property coverage (Home and high-value items, provider 'PrimeCare / LifeFirst', €145/month), the LifeFirst property plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 8). For travel coverage (€205/month) under 'PrimeCare / LifeFirst', the LifeFirst travel plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 7). The 'additional_services' include 'travel_assistance_service' (€150/month) and 'premium_membership' (€20/month). The €150/month service corresponds to '24/7 Travel Assistance' (rating 9) under travel_enhancement_services, and the €20/month membership corresponds to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10) under general_services.
